query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalPending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withOrder,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as orphaned
FROM payments p
LEFT JOIN orders o ON p.orderId = o.id
WHERE p.status = 'pending';
